# kCMTextMarkupAttribute_CharacterEdgeStyle

**Global Variable**

A style for character edges.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCMTextMarkupAttribute_CharacterEdgeStyle: CFString
```

## Discussion

This attribute’s value must be one of the constants listed below that control the shape of the edges of drawn characters. The default value is [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/kCMTextMarkupCharacterEdgeStyle_None].

## Edge Styles

- **kCMTextMarkupCharacterEdgeStyle_None**: No edge style.
- **kCMTextMarkupCharacterEdgeStyle_Raised**: A raised edge style.
- **kCMTextMarkupCharacterEdgeStyle_Depressed**: A depressed edge style.
- **kCMTextMarkupCharacterEdgeStyle_Uniform**: A uniform border style.
- **kCMTextMarkupCharacterEdgeStyle_DropShadow**: A drop shadow style.

## Styles

- **kCMTextMarkupAttribute_BoldStyle**: A bold font style.
- **kCMTextMarkupAttribute_ItalicStyle**: An italic font style.
- **kCMTextMarkupAttribute_UnderlineStyle**: An underline font style.
title: kCMTextMarkupAttribute_CharacterEdgeStyle
